ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square miles */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "pcap" REAL /* Personal consumption expenditure per capita */,
  "hwy" REAL /* Highway expenditure */,
  "water" REAL /* Water expenditure */,
  "util" REAL /* Utility expenditure */,
  "pc" REAL /* Personal income per capita */,
  "gsp" REAL /* Gross state product */,
  "emp" REAL /* Employment level */,
  "unemp" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state for the given year */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the gross state product (GSP) */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Annual inflation rate */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income per household */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date of the last user activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client device */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made in the version */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the version review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_by FOREIGN KEY ("version_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last synchronization */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, database) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key required to access the data source */,
  "last_sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the last synchronization (e.g., success, failure, partial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "synced_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data entry was last synchronized with the external data source */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the last synchronization (e.g., success, failure, partial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_mapping_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_mapping_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)
